# Install `blog-section` — Blog Section

> Canonical blog list + detail section.

📚 Knowledge base : https://resource.rahmanef.com/llms.txt
📦 Slice detail   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/slices/blog-section
🧠 JSON catalog   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/api/knowledge?slice=blog-section
🤖 Prompt page    : https://resource.rahmanef.com/agents/blog-section

## 1. Install

```bash
npx rahman-resources add blog-section
# alias: npx rr add blog-section
```

## 2. What it ships

- tags: `ui`, `blog`, `section`, `marketing`, `content`, `list`, `detail`

## 3. Wire it up

Run `npx rr add blog-section`. <BlogListSection posts hrefFor title columns layout limit /> for /blog — `hrefFor(post)` returns the per-post URL. <BlogPostView post backHref renderBody /> for /blog/[slug] — `renderBody` defaults to paragraph-split on `\n\n` (swap for an MDX renderer if you use mdx-blog).

## Rules of engagement

- shadcn-only UI primitives. No raw `<button>` / `<dialog>` / native date or file inputs.
- 200-line hard cap per source file (extract neighbours when over).
- All Convex queries hit an index (`.withIndex(...)`); never bare `.collect()`.
- Public mutations/queries declare `args:` validators + authz.
- Full ruleset: https://resource.rahmanef.com/best-practice
